title: Ryan Cliffords VR Experience 2
description: Make Minecraft into a really great VR experience with this mod pack! Now even more immersive and with better preformance!
body:
Were back again with the sequel to Ryan Cliffords VR Expirence 1! The predictably named Ryan Cliffords VR Expirence 2!

 

The pack contains all the mods that made the first pack a great VR expirence but this time adds some QOL mods as well as some much needed mods that improve preformance! With the preformance mods it gave me about a 10 fps boost which in VR can be the difference between a fun expirence and one that makes you motion sick! 

 

With visual, sound and UI mods and now preformance mods all working together to increase immersion when you put your headset on. The goal being to create a vanilla plus expirence that runs a lot smoother with more fps!



Hope you all enjoy this modpack! 

Ryan :)

Here are the links to the original mods pages for those that required it:\
Falling leaves: https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves \
Illuminations: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations \
Effective: https://modrinth.com/mod/effective
